pending_tasks.title: Enhance evaluator with pixel art specific metrics
pending_tasks.notes: 12 metrics total (7 new). Blank=0.25, circle=0.687, noise=0.597

pending_tasks.title: Fix CPPN initial complexity
pending_tasks.notes: create_enriched() with 2-4 hidden nodes, 70% enriched initial population

pending_tasks.title: Add reference-image-driven evolution
pending_tasks.notes: Pipeline now passes reference/palette from SpriteLibrary to evaluator

pending_tasks.title: Fix gem/star shape visibility
pending_tasks.notes: Default radii increased: star r1=0.42, gem r1=0.38

pending_tasks.title: Multi-layer render compositing
pending_tasks.description: Base color + texture + lighting + outline layers rendered independently then composited.

pending_tasks.title: Per-frame SDF parameter animation
pending_tasks.description: Each frame can have different SDF parameters for true shape animation.

pending_tasks.title: GIF/APNG animation export
pending_tasks.notes: Pipeline and particle system both export GIF. Cage deformer also has GIF export.

pending_tasks.title: Integrate particles + cage deform into pipeline
pending_tasks.description: Add produce_vfx() and produce_deform_animation() to AssetPipeline. Currently particles and cage deform are standalone modules not wired into the main pipeline.

pending_tasks.title: Run full evolution with new evaluator to validate improvement
pending_tasks.description: Execute produce_asset_pack() with the new 12-metric evaluator and verify that evolution actually produces better sprites than before.

pending_tasks.title: Implement palette-constrained SDF rendering
pending_tasks.description: Render SDF directly to palette colors (not post-quantize). This is the single biggest quality improvement remaining — current renders use continuous colors then quantize, losing pixel art crispness.

pending_tasks.title: Add Wave Function Collapse (WFC) for tilemap generation
pending_tasks.description: WFC can generate coherent tilemaps from a small set of example tiles. This would enable level-scale asset production.

pending_tasks.title: Add reaction-diffusion textures
pending_tasks.description: Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion for organic textures (coral, lichen, biological patterns). Complements CPPN's geometric patterns.

pending_tasks.title: Implement spring-based secondary animation
pending_tasks.description: Critically-damped spring for follow-through and overlapping action. More physically accurate than current keyframe interpolation.

pending_tasks.title: Particle system
pending_tasks.notes: Verlet particle system with 4 presets (fire, explosion, sparkle, smoke)

pending_tasks.title: Palette-constrained rendering
pending_tasks.description: Promoted to P0-NEW-3 due to importance.

pending_tasks.title: Knowledge distillation from tutorials
pending_tasks.notes: 12 rules distilled manually. Auto-distillation not yet implemented.

capability_gaps: RESOLVED: Evaluator too lenient -> 12-metric evaluator with strict thresholds
RESOLVED: CPPN textures too simple -> enriched topology with hidden layers
RESOLVED: No bone-driven deformation -> cage deformation with MVC
RESOLVED: Knowledge base empty -> 12 rules + 10 models registered
RESOLVED: No reference image comparison -> pipeline passes reference/palette
REMAINING: No palette-constrained rendering (renders continuous then quantizes)
REMAINING: Particles/cage deform not integrated into main pipeline

new_modules: mathart/animation/particles.py - Verlet particle system (4 presets, GIF export)
mathart/animation/cage_deform.py - MVC cage deformation (4 presets, GIF export)
major_rewrites: mathart/pipeline.py - reference/palette passing, GIF export, metadata
bugs_fixed: Evaluator skip-to-1.0 for missing palette/reference -> default penalty
gem/star invisible at default params -> increased radii
CPPN gradient-only output -> enriched initial topology
Knowledge base empty -> populated with rules and models
research_conducted: 8 parallel research directions covering math models, animation algorithms, pixel art evaluation, CPPN enrichment, particle systems, commercial standards, itch.io benchmarks, deformation techniques

evolution_history.notes: First real evolution run. Pipeline E2E test successful.
Infrastructure session: evaluator rewrite, CPPN enrichment, particles, cage deform, knowledge base. No new assets produced (focus was on fixing the foundation).

sdf_rendering: Inigo Quilez - 2D SDF functions and operations
animation: Thomas & Johnston (1981) - The Illusion of Life (12 Principles)
Lasseter (1987) - Principles of Traditional Animation Applied to 3D
pixel_art: Pixel art dithering: Bayer, Floyd-Steinberg, ordered patterns
OKLAB color space for perceptually uniform color manipulation
session_018_new: Procedural pixel art generation: CPPN+NEAT, WFC, L-systems, reaction-diffusion
Sprite animation math: Verlet particles, Fourier descriptors, cage deformation
Commercial sprite sheet standards (Unity/Godot JSON metadata)

custom_notes.key_insight: SESSION-018 fixed the foundation: the evaluator now has real selection pressure, CPPN produces richer textures, and two new animation systems (particles + cage deform) are ready. The next critical step is palette-constrained rendering and running a full evolution cycle to validate all improvements.
custom_notes.next_session_focus: P0-NEW-1 (integrate particles/cage into pipeline), P0-NEW-2 (run full evolution), P0-NEW-3 (palette-constrained rendering). These three will determine if the system can actually produce commercial-quality assets.
custom_notes.anti_duplication: READ DEDUP_REGISTRY.json BEFORE starting any work. All SESSION-018 changes are logged there.
